title: Web Dev Skills Roadmap

transitions.note: Docs-only track created for the Web Dev Skills Roadmap. Status remains planned until roadmap, task file, document-map registration, final diff review, and available verification checks are complete.

Roadmap doc, task file, and document-map registration are complete. state:check, docs:check, verify, test, and build passed. Not marked done because the task schema requires a commitHash for done status.

notes: Purpose: fix the learning/adoption phases for web-development skills under the current architecture. Scope: create roadmap doc; classify skills P1/P2/P3; define status vocabulary; add Agent Guardrails; map skills to phases and project areas; define acceptance criteria. Out of scope: adding new frameworks; installing Vue/Angular/PHP/Ruby/Java/MongoDB/MySQL; changing production code; changing database schema; changing environment variables.
